---
title: "Hand off to multiprocessing"
subtitle: "Pickle a typed map through a worker boundary."
jupyter: python3
sidebar: cookbook
---

## Goal

Send a derived map to a worker pool (or a joblib cache) and have the
receiving side still know *what produced it* — without shipping a
separate manifest alongside the pickle.

## Code

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys
import pickle

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd().parents[1] / "src"))

import neuroim as ni

repo = Path.cwd().parents[1] if Path.cwd().name == "cookbook" else Path.cwd()
bold = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_bold.nii.gz"))
mask = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_mask.nii.gz"), type="vol")

tsnr = bold.temporal_snr(mask=mask)

payload = pickle.dumps(tsnr, protocol=pickle.HIGHEST_PROTOCOL)
received = pickle.loads(payload)             # stands in for the worker side

(received.provenance is not None,
 received.provenance.method_name,
 received.provenance.input_space_hash == tsnr.provenance.input_space_hash,
 received.provenance.mask_hash == tsnr.provenance.mask_hash)
```

The Receipt is part of the object, so it travels with the pickle. The
worker does not need a side-channel describing what it received.

## What's guaranteed

- `DenseNeuroVol` / result objects are picklable and the round-trip
  produces an equal `Receipt` (same hashes, same `method_name`).
- This holds across a *fresh process*, not just in-process — the
  scenario below proves it via a subprocess.

## What survives the file

Pickle is not the file boundary, but the guarantee is the same shape:
the provenance is intrinsic to the object. The on-disk equivalent is
[Save a derived map](save-derived-map-with-provenance.qmd).

## Trapdoors

- Reducing to a bare `ndarray` *before* the handoff (`tsnr.data`
  instead of `tsnr`) ships numbers with no provenance — the receiving
  side cannot recover what produced them. Keep the typed carrier
  across the boundary.
- A worker that re-wraps a bare array in a fresh `DenseNeuroVol`
  invents a *new* identity; it does not recover the original Receipt.

Backed by [scenario S08](https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/neuroim-python/blob/main/examples/scenarios/08_pickle_multiprocessing_handoff/REPORT.md)
(fresh-process pickle round-trip).

## See also

- [Concept: Provenance](../concepts/provenance.qmd) — round-trip safety through pickle.
- [Save a derived map with provenance](save-derived-map-with-provenance.qmd) — the file-boundary analogue.
- Scenario [S08](https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/neuroim-python/blob/main/examples/scenarios/08_pickle_multiprocessing_handoff/REPORT.md)
